From Coq Require Morphisms Program.Basics.

Notations "exists ! _ .. _ , _" defined at level 200
with arguments binder and "exists ! _ , _"
defined at level 200 with arguments name
have incompatible prefixes.
One of them will likely not work.
[notation-incompatible-prefix,parsing,default]
Notations "exists ! _ .. _ , _" defined at level 200
with arguments binder and "exists ! _ : _ , _"
defined at level 200 with arguments name
have incompatible prefixes.
One of them will likely not work.
[notation-incompatible-prefix,parsing,default]


Local Open Scope string_scope.

(* From Staged Require Export HeapF.
From Staged Require Export LibFmap.
From Staged Require Export ExtraTactics. *)


Infix "====>" := Morphisms.respectful (at level 80, right associativity).
Notation Proper := Morphisms.Proper.
Notation respectful := Morphisms.respectful.
Notation impl := Program.Basics.impl.
Notation flip := Basics.flip.
Incantations for setoid rewriting 
Section Propriety.

  (*
    We have to prove (at most) m*n instances,
    for the m things we want to rewrite with,
    and the n things we want to rewrite in:

    |     | ⊑ | ⊢ ⊑ | <-> | ⊑ n | ⊢ ⊑ n | req | seq | bind | rs | ... | (n) |
    |   ⊑ |   |     |     |     |       |     |     |      |    |     |     |
    | ⊢ ⊑ |   |     |     |     |       |     |     |      |    |     |     |
    | <-> |   |     |     |     |       |     |     |      |    |     |     |
    | ... |   |     |     |     |       |     |     |      |    |     |     |
    | (m) |   |     |     |     |       |     |     |      |    |     |     |

    The definitions here are grouped by column.
    The naming convention is Proper_[col]_[row].

  *)

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  entails

    
forall x y : flow,
flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
   s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2)
  x y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
 
x, y: flow
H: flip
  (fun f1 f2 : flow =>
   forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
     (R : result),
   s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 ->
   s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2) x y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
 auto.
  Qed.

  
ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] -> ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ empty

  
ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] -> ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ empty

    
H: ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ empty

    
H: ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
ens_ \[2 = 2] ⊑ empty

  Abort.

  
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  entails

  
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  entails

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->

(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) <->
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0)

forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (gentails n))
     (respectful (gentails n) impl)) entails

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (gentails n))
     (respectful (gentails n) impl)) entails

forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0

  Abort.

  Definition gentails1 f1 f2 :=
    forall n, gentails n f1 f2.

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip gentails1)
     (respectful gentails1 impl)) entails

  
Proper
  (respectful (flip gentails1)
     (respectful gentails1 impl)) entails

H: forall n : nat, y ⊆ n x
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall n : nat, x0 ⊆ n y0
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0

h1, h2: heap
v: var
f: flow
f0: val -> flow
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft v f f0 |= y
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft v f f0 |= y0

  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x /\
  (fb ⊆ 0 fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ 0 fk1 v)

  (f ⊆ 0 fb1) /\ (forall v : val, f0 v ⊆ 0 fk1 v)

        components of shift results to be weakened *)
      admit. }

forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  (entails_under env)

(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) <->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0)

forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0

    eauto.
  Qed.

  (* For rewriting in the goal. Some of the flipped instances are for this purpose.
     Without them, we can only rewrite in the Coq or the staged context. *)
  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful entails
     (respectful (flip entails) (flip impl)))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful entails
     (respectful (flip entails) (flip impl)))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0

    eauto.
  Qed.

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0

    auto.
  Qed.

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env)
     (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
        (flip impl))) (entails_under env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env)
     (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
        (flip impl))) (entails_under env)

    
forall (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0 -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0) ->
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0

    
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0 ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0
H1: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
R: result
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0

    auto.
  Qed.

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (gentails n)

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (gentails n)

    
forall (n : nat) (x y : flow),
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
x ⊆ n x0 -> y ⊆ n y0

forall x y : flow,

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x) ->

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
x ⊆ n x0 -> y ⊆ n y0

y ⊆ 0 y0

H3: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)
y ⊆ S n y0

fb: flow

H3: exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\

forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (gentails n))
     (respectful (gentails n) impl)) (gentails n)

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (flip (gentails n))
     (respectful (gentails n) impl)) (gentails n)

    
forall (n : nat) (x y : flow),
y ⊆ n x ->
forall x0 y0 : flow, x0 ⊆ n y0 -> x ⊆ n x0 -> y ⊆ n y0

y ⊆ n x ->

H1: x ⊆ 0 x0
y ⊆ 0 y0

k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
fb1: flow
fk1: val -> flow
H3: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x
H: fb ⊆ n fb1
H5: forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

      
n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
y ⊆ n x -> forall x0 y0 : flow, x0 ⊆ n y0 -> x ⊆ n x0 -> y ⊆ n y0
x, y, x0, y0: flow
H0: x0 ⊆ S n y0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
fb1: flow
fk1: val -> flow
H3: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x
H: fb ⊆ n fb1
H5: forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

forall (n : nat) (env : senv),
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  (gentails_under env n)

  
forall (n : nat) (env : senv),
Proper
  (respectful bientails (respectful bientails iff))
  (gentails_under env n)

    
forall (n : nat) (env : senv) (x y : flow),
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
env ⊢ x ⊆ x0 <-> env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
env ⊢ x ⊆ x0 <-> env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

env ⊢ x ⊆ x0 <-> env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

H3: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y ->
env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
H4: exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)

        
n: nat
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 <->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H1: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x
H3: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y ->
env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x
H2: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
fb1: flow
fk1: val -> flow
H5: env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0
H4: env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1
H7: forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v
env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0

        applys* H0. } }
  Qed.

  
forall (n : nat) (env : senv),
Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (gentails_under env n)

Proper
  (respectful (flip entails) (respectful entails impl))
  (gentails_under env n)

 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
env ⊢ x ⊆ x0 -> env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

forall (n : nat) (env : senv),
Proper
  (respectful (flip (entails_under env))
     (respectful (entails_under env) impl))
  (gentails_under env n)

env ⊢ x ⊆ x0 -> env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),

  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)
env ⊢ y ⊆ y0

      
n: nat
env: senv
x, y: flow
H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
H4: forall (s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)
forall (s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)

k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow

env: senv
x, y, x0, y0: flow

h1, h2: heap

H4: exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= x0 /\

exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  env, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 /\
  (env ⊢ fb ⊆ fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, env ⊢ fk v ⊆ fk1 v)

  Qed.

  (* Definition res_weaker R1 R2 :=
    match R1, R2 with
    | norm v1, norm v2 => v1 = v2
    | shft k1 fb1 fk1, shft k2 fb2 fk2 =>
      k1 = k2 /\
      entails fb1 fb2 /\
      (forall v, entails (fk1 v) (fk2 v))
    | _, _ => False
    end.

  #[global]
  Instance Proper_satisfies_entails_weaker : Proper
    (eq ====> eq ====> eq ====> eq ====> res_weaker ====> entails ====> impl)
    satisfies.
  Proof.
    unfold entails, Proper, respectful, impl, res_weaker.
    intros. subst.
    destruct x3; destruct y3; subst.
    - auto.
    - false.
    - false.
    - destr H3.
      specializes H4 H5.
  Abort. *)
entails is proper wrt satisfies 
  
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq
              (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))))))
  satisfies

  
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq
              (respectful eq (respectful entails impl))))))
  satisfies

    
forall x y : senv,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : senv,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : heap,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : heap,
x2 = y2 ->
forall x3 y3 : result,
x3 = y3 ->
forall x4 y4 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4) ->
x, x0, x1, x2, x3 |= x4 -> y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4

    
x, y: senv
H: x = y
x0, y0: senv
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: heap
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: heap
H2: x2 = y2
x3, y3: result
H3: x3 = y3
x4, y4: flow
H4: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4
H5: x, x0, x1, x2, x3 |= x4
y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4
 
y, y0: senv
y1, y2: heap
y3: result
x4, y4: flow
H4: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4
H5: y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= x4
y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4

    auto.
  Qed.

  (respectful eq

           (respectful eq
              (respectful eq
                 (respectful bientails impl))))))
  satisfies

        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq

forall x y : senv,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : senv,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : heap,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : heap,
x2 = y2 ->
forall x3 y3 : result,
x3 = y3 ->
forall x4 y4 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 <-> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4) ->
x, x0, x1, x2, x3 |= x4 -> y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4

    
x, y: senv
H: x = y
x0, y0: senv
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: heap
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: heap
H2: x2 = y2
x3, y3: result
H3: x3 = y3
x4, y4: flow
H4: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 <->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4
H5: x, x0, x1, x2, x3 |= x4
y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4
 
y, y0: senv
y1, y2: heap
y3: result
x4, y4: flow
H4: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 <->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4
H5: y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= x4
y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= y4

    
y, y0: senv
y1, y2: heap
y3: result
x4, y4: flow
H4: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result) (s1 s2 : senv),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x4 <->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y4
H5: y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= x4
y, y0, y1, y2, y3 |= x4

    auto.
  Qed.

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq
              (respectful (entails_under env) impl)))))
  (satisfies env)

  
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful eq
     (respectful eq
        (respectful eq
           (respectful eq
              (respectful (entails_under env) impl)))))
  (satisfies env)

    
forall env x y : senv,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : heap,
x0 = y0 ->
forall x1 y1 : heap,
x1 = y1 ->
forall x2 y2 : result,
x2 = y2 ->
forall x3 y3 : flow,
(forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x3 -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y3) ->
env, x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3 -> env, y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    
env, x, y: senv
H: x = y
x0, y0: heap
H0: x0 = y0
x1, y1: heap
H1: x1 = y1
x2, y2: result
H2: x2 = y2
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x3 ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y3
H4: env, x, x0, x1, x2 |= x3
env, y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3
 
env, y: senv
y0, y1: heap
y2: result
x3, y3: flow
H3: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x3 ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y3
H4: env, y, y0, y1, y2 |= x3
env, y, y0, y1, y2 |= y3

    auto.
  Qed.

  (* A weaker Proper instance that only allows rewriting in the left
     side of a seq. Intuitively, we can no longer rely on the right side
     being weaker because it may change entirely, if we rewrite to a
     [shft] on the left which then consumes the right side into its
     continuation. *)
  
Proper (respectful entails (respectful eq entails))
  seq

  
Proper (respectful entails (respectful eq entails))
  seq

    
forall x y : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
x0 = y0 ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (x;; x0) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (y;; y0)

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: x0 = y0

h1, h2: heap
R: result
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (x;; x0)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (y;; y0)

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y

R: result
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (x;; y0)
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (y;; y0)

y0: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H1: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= x
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= y0
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (y;; y0)
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
y0: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in y0)
|= (y;; y0)

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
y0: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H1: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= x
H8: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= y0
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (y;; y0)
 applys* s_bind. 
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
y0: flow

s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in y0)
|= (y;; y0)

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
y0: flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in y0)
|= (y;; y0)
 applys* s_bind_sh. }
  Qed.

  (f2 fk : val -> flow) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (fb : flow) (k : var),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= f1 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let x = fk r1 in f2 x)
|= (let x = f1 in f2 x)

shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in x0)
|= (y;; y0)

h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb
  (fun r1 : val => let x = fk r1 in ?TEMP3 x)
|= (let x = y in ?TEMP3 x)
s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in x0)
|= (y;; y0)

x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),

fk: val -> flow

k: var
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
H2: s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in x0)
|= (let _ = y in x0)
y;; y0 = let _ = y in x0
 
x, y: flow

x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
x0, y0: flow
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),

h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= y
y;; y0 = let _ = y in x0

      (* the proof is stuck here because we want y0 and x0 to be related by
         something weaker than equality (entailment), but the relation
         between results in the semantics is equality *)
      admit.
      (* TODO what if we can assume shift-freedom to get rid of this case? *)
    }
  Abort.

  
f: flow
ShiftFree f ->
Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f)

  
f: flow

Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f)

    
f: flow
ShiftFree f ->
forall x y : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; y)

h1, h2: heap

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; y)

R: result

h3: heap

H10: s3, s2, h3, h2, R |= x
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f;; y)

s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
fk: val -> flow
fb: flow
k: var

s1, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let _ = fk r1 in x)
|= (f;; y)

 no_shift. 
f: flow
H: ShiftFree f
x, y: flow

forall env : senv,
ShiftFree f1 ->
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env) (entails_under env))
  (seq f1)

     (respectful eq (entails_under env))) seq

      apply~ H. }
  Qed.

  
forall f1 : flow,
ShiftFree f1 ->
Proper (respectful entails entails) (seq f1)

  (* this is essentially the same as entails *)
  
forall f1 : flow,
ShiftFree f1 ->
Proper
  (respectful
     (fun f2 f3 : flow =>
      forall env : senv, env ⊢ f2 ⊑ f3)
     (fun f2 f3 : flow =>
      forall env : senv, env ⊢ f2 ⊑ f3)) (seq f1)

  
forall f1 : flow,
ShiftFree f1 ->
Proper
  (respectful
     (fun f2 f3 : flow =>
      forall env : senv, env ⊢ f2 ⊑ f3)
     (fun f2 f3 : flow =>
      forall env : senv, env ⊢ f2 ⊑ f3)) (seq f1)

  (* Check respectful. *)

 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall (env : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv)
  (R : result),
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; x) ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; y)

  Definition env_constant f :=
    (* forall s h1 h2 R, satisfies s s h1 h2 R f. *)
    forall s1 s2 h1 h2 R, satisfies s1 s2 h1 h2 R f -> s1 = s2.

  
forall Q : postcond, env_constant (ens r. Q r)

  
forall Q : postcond, env_constant (ens r. Q r)

    
forall (Q : postcond) (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap)
  (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. Q r) -> s1 = s2
 
Q: postcond
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. Q r)
s1 = s2

    
Q: postcond
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H: exists (v : val) (h3 : heap),
  R = norm v /\
  Q v h3 /\ h2 = h1 \u h3 /\ Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2 = s2
 
Q: postcond
s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
v: val
h3: heap
H0: R = norm v
H: Q v h3
H1: h2 = h1 \u h3
H3: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
s2 = s2

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
forall f1 f2 : flow,
shift_free f1 ->
env_constant f1 ->
env_constant f2 -> env_constant (f1;; f2)

  
forall f1 f2 : flow,
shift_free f1 ->
env_constant f1 ->
env_constant f2 -> env_constant (f1;; f2)

    
forall f1 f2 : flow,
shift_free f1 ->
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 -> s1 = s2) ->
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2 -> s1 = s2) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2) -> s1 = s2
 
f1, f2: flow
H: shift_free f1
H0: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f1 -> s1 = s2
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= f2 -> s1 = s2

s1 = s2

  Class EnvConstant f : Prop :=
    { env_constant_pf :
      forall s1 s2 h1 h2 R, satisfies s1 s2 h1 h2 R f -> s1 = s2 }.

  
forall Q : postcond, EnvConstant (ens r. Q r)

  
forall Q : postcond, EnvConstant (ens r. Q r)

    
Q: postcond
EnvConstant (ens r. Q r)
 
Q: postcond
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (ens r. Q r) -> s1 = s2

    apply env_constant_ens.
  Qed.

  
forall f1 f2 : flow,
ShiftFree f1 ->
EnvConstant f1 ->
EnvConstant f2 -> EnvConstant (f1;; f2)

ShiftFree f1 ->
EnvConstant f1 ->
EnvConstant f2 -> EnvConstant (f1;; f2)

H0: EnvConstant f1
H1: EnvConstant f2

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (f1;; f2) -> s1 = s2

f1, f2: flow
H: ShiftFree f1
H0: EnvConstant f1
H1: EnvConstant f2
env_constant f2

    destruct* H1.
  Qed.

  
forall (env : senv) (f1 : flow),
ShiftFree f1 ->
EnvConstant f1 ->
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env) (entails_under env))
  (seq f1)

EnvConstant f1 ->
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env) (entails_under env))
  (seq f1)

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = y in y0 x)

forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful (entails_under env)
     (respectful eq (entails_under env))) bind

Proper

     (respectful eq (entails_under env))) bind

env, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = y in y0 x)

env, s2, h1, h2,
shft k fb (fun r1 : val => let x = fk r1 in x0 x)
|= (let x = y in y0 x)

  (* Definition cont_entails fk1 fk2 := forall v, entails (fk1 v) (fk2 v).

  #[global]
  Instance Proper_bind_sf : forall f1,
    ShiftFree f1 ->
    Proper (cont_entails ====> entails) (bind f1).
  Proof.
    unfold Proper, cont_entails, entails, respectful.
    intros.
    inverts H1 as H1; destr H1.
    { apply* s_bind. }
    { apply H in H1. false. }
  Qed.

  #[global]
  Instance Proper_bind_sf2 : forall f1,
    ShiftFree f1 ->
    Proper ((fun fk2 fk3 =>
        forall v env, entails_under env (fk2 v) (fk3 v)) ====>
      (fun f2 f3 => forall env, entails_under env f2 f3)) (bind f1).
  Proof.
    unfold Proper, entails_under, entails, respectful.
    intros.
    inverts H1. 2: { apply H in H8. false. }
    applys* s_bind.
  Qed. *)

  
ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] ->
let _ = ens_ \[1 = 1] in empty ⊑ empty

  
ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] ->
let _ = ens_ \[1 = 1] in empty ⊑ empty

    
H: ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
let _ = ens_ \[1 = 1] in empty ⊑ empty

    
H: ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
let _ = ens_ \[2 = 2] in empty ⊑ empty

  Abort.

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= (let x = f1 in y x)

|= (let x0 = f1 in x x0)

let _ = empty in ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ empty

    
H: ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
let _ = empty in ens_ \[2 = 2] ⊑ empty

  Abort.

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (gentails n)
     (respectful
        (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
        (gentails n))) bind

  
forall n : nat,
Proper
  (respectful (gentails n)
     (respectful
        (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
        (gentails n))) bind

    
forall (n : nat) (x y : flow),
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n y0 a) ->
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x

    
n: nat
forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n y0 a) ->
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
 
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ 0 y
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ 0 let x = y in y0 x

x ⊆ n y ->

H: x ⊆ S n y

H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ S n y0 a
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ S n let x = y in y0 x

    
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ 0 y
x0, y0: val -> flow

x, y: flow
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ 0 let x = y in y0 x

      
x, y: flow
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = x in x0 x) ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = y in y0 x)
 
x, y: flow
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
v: val
H: s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = x in x0 x)
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = y in y0 x)

      
x, y: flow
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
H1: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
v: val
s3: senv
h3: heap
v0: val
H2: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v0 |= x
H3: s3, s2, h3, h2, norm v |= x0 v0
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = y in y0 x)

x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ 0 y0 a
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
v: val
s3: senv
h3: heap
v0: val

s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = y in y0 x)

x, y: flow
x0, y0: val -> flow

v: val
s3: senv
h3: heap
v0: val

s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x0 v0 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y0 v0
s3, s2, h3, h2, norm v |= y0 v0

      applys H H3.

IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,

      (* already we see the capacities are wrong, as we don't have shifts in both sides *)
      
n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n y0 a) -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ S n y
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ S n y0 a
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x = x in x0 x) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

H0: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ S n y0 a

h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk
|= (let x = x in x0 x)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\

IHn: forall x y : flow,

v, a: val
H4: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x0 a ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y0 a /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)
x0 a ⊆ n y0 a

          admit.

    }
  Abort.

  (* this statement also isn't easy to use *)
  
forall n n1 n2 : nat,
n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
Proper
  (respectful (gentails n1)
     (respectful
        (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val
           (gentails n2)) (gentails n))) bind

  
forall n n1 n2 : nat,
n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
Proper
  (respectful (gentails n1)
     (respectful
        (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val
           (gentails n2)) (gentails n))) bind

    
forall n n1 n2 : nat,
n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n1 y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n2 y0 a) ->
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x

n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
forall x y : flow,

forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,

n: nat
IHn: forall n1 n2 : nat,
n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n1 y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n2 y0 a) -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
n1, n2: nat
H: S n = (n1 + n2)%nat
x, y: flow
H0: x ⊆ n1 y
x0, y0: val -> flow
H1: forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n2 y0 a
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x = x in x0 x) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
forall x y : flow,

forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,

H1: x0 v ⊆ n2 y0 v
H2: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (v : val),
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\

n = (n1 + n2)%nat ->
forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n1 y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x0 a ⊆ n2 y0 a) -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x

H: S n = (S n0 + n2)%nat

x0, y0: val -> flow
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow

h3: heap

H1: x0 v ⊆ n2 y0 v
H2: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= x ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= y /\
  (fb ⊆ n0 fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n0 fk1 v)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

H4: forall v : val, fk0 v ⊆ n0 fk1 v
forall v : val,
let x = fk0 v in x0 x ⊆ n
(fun r1 : val => let x = fk1 r1 in y0 x) v

Proper
  (respectful (gentails n)
     (respectful eq (gentails n))) bind

n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->

forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x = x in x0 x) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)
 
n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
x0 = y0 -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ S n y
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: x0 = y0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk
|= (let x = x in x0 x)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

      
n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
x0 = y0 -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ S n y
x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: x0 = y0

h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H9: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= x
H10: s3, s2, h3, h2, shft k fb fk |= x0 v
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)
n: nat
IHn: forall x y : flow,
x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
x0 = y0 -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
x, y: flow
H: x ⊆ S n y

H0: x0 = y0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk0: val -> flow
H7: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk0 |= x
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\
  (forall v : val, let x = fk0 v in x0 x ⊆ n fk1 v)

x ⊆ n y ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
x0 = y0 -> let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x

x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: x0 = y0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
s3: senv
h3: heap
v: val
H9: s1, s3, h1, h3, norm v |= x
H10: s3, s2, h3, h2, shft k fb fk |= x0 v
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

        (* x returns norm but we have x <= y at S n.
          this points to needing to quantify over the first use of n. *)

Proper
  (respectful gentails1 (respectful eq (gentails n)))
  bind

forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x = x in x0 x) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

x0, y0: val -> flow
H0: x0 = y0
n: nat
IHn: let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk
|= (let x = x in x0 x)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

forall (n : nat) (f : flow),
ShiftFree f ->
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
     (gentails n)) (bind f)

  
forall (n : nat) (f : flow),
ShiftFree f ->
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
     (gentails n)) (bind f)

    
forall (n : nat) (f : flow),
ShiftFree f ->
forall x y : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x a ⊆ n y a) ->
let x0 = f in x x0 ⊆ n let x = f in y x

    
n: nat
forall f : flow,
ShiftFree f ->
forall x y : val -> flow,
(forall a : val, x a ⊆ n y a) ->
let x0 = f in x x0 ⊆ n let x = f in y x

H: ShiftFree f

H0: forall a : val, x a ⊆ 0 y a
let x0 = f in x x0 ⊆ 0 let x = f in y x

s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= (let x = f in y x)

forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x0 = f in x x0) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= (let x = f in y x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

        false shift_free_pf H7.

Proper
  (respectful gentails1
     (respectful
        (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val gentails1)
        (gentails n))) bind

(forall n0 : nat, x ⊆ n0 y) ->
forall x0 y0 : val -> flow,
(forall (a : val) (n0 : nat), x0 a ⊆ n0 y0 a) ->
let x = x in x0 x ⊆ n let x = y in y0 x

  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1
  |= (let x = y in y0 x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

forall (n : nat) (f : flow),
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
     (gentails n)) (bind f)

  
forall (n : nat) (f : flow),
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation val (gentails n))
     (gentails n)) (bind f)

(forall a : val, x a ⊆ n y a) ->
let x0 = f in x x0 ⊆ n let x = f in y x

n: nat
IHn: forall (f : flow) (x y : val -> flow),
(forall a : val, x a ⊆ n y a) -> let x0 = f in x x0 ⊆ n let x = f in y x
f: flow
x, y: val -> flow
H: forall a : val, x a ⊆ S n y a
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (k : var)
  (fb : flow) (fk : val -> flow),
s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk |= (let x0 = f in x x0) ->
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= (let x = f in y x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

h1, h2: heap
k: var
fb: flow

H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb fk
|= (let x0 = f in x x0)
exists (fb1 : flow) (fk1 : val -> flow),
  s1, s2, h1, h2, shft k fb1 fk1 |= (let x = f in y x) /\
  (fb ⊆ n fb1) /\ (forall v : val, fk v ⊆ n fk1 v)

ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊆ n ens_ \[2 = 2] ->
let _ = ens_ \[1 = 1] in empty ⊆ n empty

forall x y : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs y

    
x, y: flow
H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs x
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs y
 
x, y: flow

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H0: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs x
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs y

    
x, y: flow

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
k: var
s4: senv
h4: heap
fb: flow
fk: val -> flow
H0: s1, s4, h1, h4, shft k fb fk |= x
H7: Fmap.update s4 k (fun a : val => rs (fk a)), s2,
h4, h2, R |= rs fb
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= rs y

H: forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
s1, s2: senv

v: val

s1, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= rs y

h4, h2, R |= rs fb

bientails (rs (ens_ \[1 = 1])) (rs (ens_ \[2 = 2])) ->
rs (let _ = rs (ens_ \[1 = 1]) in empty) ⊑ empty

  
bientails (rs (ens_ \[1 = 1])) (rs (ens_ \[2 = 2])) ->
rs (let _ = rs (ens_ \[1 = 1]) in empty) ⊑ empty

    
H: bientails (rs (ens_ \[1 = 1]))
  (rs (ens_ \[2 = 2]))
rs (let _ = rs (ens_ \[1 = 1]) in empty) ⊑ empty

    
H: bientails (rs (ens_ \[1 = 1]))
  (rs (ens_ \[2 = 2]))
rs (let _ = rs (ens_ \[2 = 2]) in empty) ⊑ empty

  Abort.

H: forall (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv) (R : result),
s, s2, h1, h2, R |= x -> s, s2, h1, h2, R |= y
h1, h2: heap
s2: senv
v: val
H0: s, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= x
s, s2, h1, h2, norm v |= y
 eauto. }
  Qed.

  
A: Type
forall env : senv,
Proper
  (respectful
     (Morphisms.pointwise_relation A
        (entails_under env)) (entails_under env))
  (fex (A:=A))

(forall (a : A) (h1 h2 : heap) (s2 : senv)

 env, s2, h1, h2, R |= y a) ->

env, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ xn, x xn) ->
env, s2, h1, h2, R |= (∃ xn, y xn)

forall x y : hprop,
x = y ->
forall x0 y0 : flow,
(forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
 s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= x0 -> s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0) ->
forall (s1 s2 : senv) (h1 h2 : heap) (R : result),
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req x x0 ->
s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req y y0

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req y y0

s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= y0
s1, s2: senv
h1, h2: heap
R: result
H1: s1, s2, h1, h2, R |= req x x0
forall hp hr : heap,
y hp ->
h1 = hr \u hp ->
Fmap.disjoint hr hp -> s1, s2, hr, h2, R |= y0

H: x = y
x0, y0: flow

hp, hr: heap

forall l : loc,
empty_env ⊢ ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] ->
empty_env
⊢ rs
    (let _ =
     req (l ~~> 1) (ens_ (l ~~> 1);; ens_ \[1 = 1])
     in empty) ⊑ empty

  
forall l : loc,
empty_env ⊢ ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2] ->
empty_env
⊢ rs
    (let _ =
     req (l ~~> 1) (ens_ (l ~~> 1);; ens_ \[1 = 1])
     in empty) ⊑ empty

    
l: loc
H: empty_env ⊢ ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
empty_env
⊢ rs
    (let _ =
     req (l ~~> 1) (ens_ (l ~~> 1);; ens_ \[1 = 1])
     in empty) ⊑ empty

    
l: loc
H: empty_env ⊢ ens_ \[1 = 1] ⊑ ens_ \[2 = 2]
empty_env
⊢ rs
    (let _ =
     req (l ~~> 1) (ens_ (l ~~> 1);; ens_ \[2 = 2])
     in empty) ⊑ empty

  Abort.

End Propriety.
